name: capacity-trend-forecaster
description: Analyze Huawei Cloud CCE periodic capacity trends, forecast resource bottlenecks, simulate elasticity policies, generate charts and reports, compare recurring history records, and recommend HPA or node autoscaler optimization.

tools.name: huawei_analyze_cce_capacity_trend
tools.description: Run huawei_analyze_cce_capacity_trend through the shared Huawei Cloud dispatcher.

region.description: Huawei Cloud region, for example cn-north-4.

ak.description: Access Key ID. Prefer HUAWEI_AK environment variable.

sk.description: Secret Access Key. Prefer HUAWEI_SK environment variable.

project_id.description: Huawei Cloud project ID. Prefer HUAWEI_PROJECT_ID environment variable.
